body:
<!--- THESE LINES ARE COMMENTED -->
## Purpose 
Includes some changes from #1501  to break that PR up into smaller pieces. Here we have mostly src/docs changes, and restructuring some code that was in oceananigans.jl before. This should not change any behavior.

## Content
- [x] add a `get_field` function for `ice_concentration`
- [x] update some documentation
- [x] move some shared functions out of oceananigans.jl and into climaocean_helpers.jl
title: initial ClimaSeaIce changes

body:
<!--- THESE LINES ARE COMMENTED -->
## Purpose 
Remove redundant tests so we test each added functionality only once (or as few times as possible)

## Content
Removed runs:
- Slabplanet timevarying insolation + rayleigh sponge
  - tested by other runs
- AMIP: ED only + integrated land
  - we test this on GPU too, can remove the CPU run
- AMIP: ED only + bucket
  - we test this on GPU too, can remove the CPU run
- AMIP - Float32 test
  - we already use Float32 for a lot of other runs
- GPU Slabplanet: default
  - we can just test this on CPU
- GPU Slabplanet: extra atmos diagnostics
  - already tested on CPU
- GPU AMIP: default
  - we can just test this on CPU
- GPU AMIP target: topography and diagnostic EDMF
  - the 2 "GPU AMIP: diag. EDMF + X" already use Earth topography + diagnostic EDMF

also switches ""Slabplanet: dry, no radiation" to use `evolving_ocean: false`  so we don't have to test that in the longruns

<!---
Review checklist

- followed the codebase contribution guide: https://clima.github.io/ClimateMachine.jl/latest/Contributing/
